title: Verify engagement content section shows correct content based on user history
description: Tests the logic of the 'Engagement' section in the Trial Corner, ensuring it shows resume-watching content or recommendations as specified.
preconditions: Two users (C and D) have active trials and are in the Trial Corner cohort.

steps.description: 1. For User C, start watching a movie ('Action Movie A') and stop at 50% completion.
2. For User D, fully watch a comedy show ('Comedy Show B').
3. Have User C navigate to the Trial Corner.
4. Verify the 'Engagement' section prompts User C to resume watching 'Action Movie A'.
5. Have User D navigate to the Trial Corner.
6. Verify the 'Engagement' section shows a recommendation for a top content in the comedy genre.

expected_result: The 'Engagement' section dynamically displays content relevant to the user's viewing history, correctly showing 'resume' for partially watched content and 'recommendations' for completed content.
